data.name: Autvestor
data.summary: Automated quantitative investment research platform (Python 3.10+, package autvestor). Pipeline: data -> features -> modes (signal in [-1,1]) -> ensemble vote -> allocator -> risk -> broker -> reports/db. Measures strategies honestly by money net of fees; backtest/paper-trade default, optional live broker (Alpaca). Dash UI + optional FastAPI. Active dev on branch dev/finetuning; main is the PR target.

data.title: Rank strategies by money net of fees, not percentages
data.rationale: Every simulated trade pays realistic commission (10 bps) + slippage (5 bps); results reported as currency profit net of fees. Benchmark forensics showed fee drag decides real-world rankings and swamps thin directional edges (active methods trade at ~49-52% accuracy).

data.title: Honest passive baseline: buy_and_keep + rank by Sharpe
data.rationale: The benchmark buy_and_hold was vol-targeted (~60-80% invested), halving returns. Added buy_and_keep (equal-weight once, no vol scaling, rebalance_every=1e9). On 5y/10+5bps: buy_and_keep +$132.8k(34%DD) > buy_and_hold +$64.3k(19%DD) > copy experts +$59.9k > tsmom +$4.8k > most active negative. Both passives ~Sharpe 0.80 — the dollar lead is exposure/leverage, not timing; rank by Sharpe. Do not re-derive.

data.title: Per-method cost-aware target smoothing
data.rationale: weight_smoothing glides part-way to each new target (Garleanu-Pedersen 'trade toward the aim') instead of chasing every signal swing; cuts turnover/fees ~7x and rescues most active-method edge without changing signals. Opt-in per native horizon (fast/turnover-heavy methods smooth; slow monthly methods do not, to avoid over-damping).

data.title: Strategies are plug-in modes combined by an Ensemble
data.rationale: Each mode implements a common Protocol (modes/base.py: name/fit/signal -> DataFrame in [-1,1]) and registers in REGISTRY (build_mode). An Ensemble combines any selection by voting (weighted_avg/majority_vote/perf_weighted/regime_gated/mi_weighted) so the whole can beat its parts.

data.title: Event-driven backtest engine with a message bus
data.rationale: engine/backtest.py precomputes causal ensemble signals, sells-before-buys, gates on rebalance band/frequency, and on a drawdown breach flattens to cash; bus.py decouples strategy/risk/execution; montecarlo.py gives probabilistic risk/return. Oracle-validated (see convention inv-engine-oracle-validated).

data.title: Stdlib-only storage + OIDC auth; optional deps degrade gracefully
data.rationale: Tracking DB uses sqlite3; OIDC (google/apple) auth uses httpx + flask session (no authlib/pyjwt). Acceleration/cache deps (numba, torch, redis) are optional extras that must degrade to numpy / in-process backends; offline synthetic data is the default.

data.title: Report Deflated Sharpe Ratio + leakage-free OOS stats
data.rationale: benchmarks/stats.py reports the Deflated Sharpe Ratio (Bailey & Lopez de Prado) to correct for the best-of-~20-methods selection bias, plus bootstrap p-values, information ratio, and walk-forward / purged k-fold splits for leakage-free out-of-sample testing.

data.statement: Real-money actions require layered consent: explicit flag (--confirm / paper:false) AND AUTVESTOR_CONFIRM_LIVE=yes AND a configured login, with an audit_log entry. Paper/backtest is the default everywhere; live UI callbacks and the trade loop must call auth.require_live_auth()/ensure_live_allowed().
Signals must be causal: row t uses only data <= t; refit windows exclude the target; performance-weighting uses only outcomes realized by t. Clip signals via modes.base._clip.

No per-bar Python loops in signal paths; vectorize (sliding_window_view, offset bincount, batched matmul/bmm). Pin every new numeric kernel with an equivalence-to-reference test at machine precision (atol ~1e-10).
Never commit credentials.yaml, data/autvestor.db, output/, or .coverage (all gitignored). Broker keys live only in the git-ignored credentials file.
Import numba/torch/redis lazily and degrade gracefully (numpy / in-process backends); never hard-require an optional dependency.
Report net profit + fees/slippage in currency (not just %); thread fee_bps/slippage_bps/rebalance_band/rebalance_every through any new config surface (CLI flag + UI control + YAML).

data.name: Protocol + registry pattern everywhere
data.example: modes (REGISTRY/build_mode), portfolio (build_allocator), execution (PROVIDERS) all use a Protocol + registry. New component: implement the protocol, register it, never special-case downstream.

data.name: Every UI control has a help entry
data.example: Each new Dash control/button needs a HELP_TEXTS entry (a test enforces it); fields via _field, buttons via _action; pure-CSS Details popovers with no extra callbacks. Live-money actions must call auth.require_live_auth().

data.name: Test + venv invocation
data.example: .venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -q (289+ tests, ~5s); coverage via --cov=autvestor --cov-report=term-missing; hypothesis property tests. venv is uv-managed: install extras with `uv pip install <pkg> --python .venv/Scripts/python.exe` (no pip inside the venv).

data.name: Checklist for adding a strategy mode
data.example: validate ctor -> vectorised causal signal -> _clip -> REGISTRY -> simulations MODE_PARAMS + benchmark spec (rebalance_every by horizon: 1 daily / 5 weekly / 21 monthly) -> tests: shape/bounds/validation + behavioral + (if a kernel) equivalence-to-reference.

data.name: Error handling by path
data.example: Errors in cache/persistence side-paths are swallowed (best-effort, must never raise into callers); trading/engine errors are never swallowed.

data.name: Regenerate the docs hub after doc edits
data.example: After README/docs edits run `python docs/build_docs.py` to regenerate docs/index.html and commit it. Method formulas+sources live in docs/methods.md; auth/db/live in docs/trading.md.

data.name: Engine is oracle-validated — don't blame it first
data.example: An oracle test (perfect next-day direction) yields +154% vs +15% buy-and-hold, proving the engine rewards timing. When a method underperforms, suspect the signal/fees, not the engine. buy_and_hold leading after fees is the expected, honest result, not a bug.

data.name: Strategy modes + Ensemble
data.location: autvestor/modes/ — 14 built-ins (tsmom, xs_momentum, mean_reversion, markov, fft, kalman, hurst, perm_entropy, info_theory, temporal_ising(inverse_ising), news/audience_sentiment, copy_trading, buy_and_hold) + trend_overlay/dual_momentum overlays + Ensemble (weighted_avg/majority_vote/perf_weighted/regime_gated/mi_weighted).

data.name: Event-driven backtest engine
data.location: autvestor/engine/ — backtest.py (causal precompute, sells-before-buys, rebalance gates, drawdown-halt-to-cash), bus.py (message bus), montecarlo.py, passive.py (buy_and_keep_curve).

data.name: Portfolio allocators
data.location: autvestor/portfolio/ — equal_weight, hrp (hierarchical risk parity), ising_select, plus min_variance, risk_parity (ERC), black_litterman on Ledoit-Wolf-shrunk covariance.

data.name: Risk guards
data.location: autvestor/risk/ — vol_target, kelly, drawdown stop, guards (concentration/leverage caps, circuit breakers that halt trading).

data.name: Execution + broker layer
data.location: autvestor/execution/ — PaperBroker/BacktestBroker (fee_bps+slippage_bps per fill), base protocol; live.py AlpacaBroker (account/positions/orders/ACH transfers) + PROVIDERS registry; IBKR secondary.

data.name: Dash web app + optional FastAPI
data.location: autvestor/ui/ — Dash app (5 tabs, (?) help on every control, scoped auth + OIDC google/apple, wsgi.py for gunicorn, :8050); autvestor/api/app.py optional FastAPI REST (:8000) for mobile/agents/scripts.

data.name: SQLite tracking database
data.location: autvestor/storage/db.py — data/autvestor.db (gitignored): users, auth_identities, broker_accounts, config_profiles, runs, orders, fills, equity_points, signal_snapshots, news_items, append-only audit_log.

data.name: Benchmark + significance harness
data.location: autvestor/benchmarks/ — runner.py (head-to-head money/Calmar ranking incl. combos + copy_demo_experts), stats.py (Deflated Sharpe, bootstrap, walk-forward/purged k-fold); autvestor/simulations/ mode-combination grid.

data.name: Market data + cache
data.location: autvestor/data/ — synthetic default (offline) + market_api.py Yahoo fetcher (dividend-adjusted adjclose); autvestor/cache.py cached(key,producer,ttl): Redis when AUTVESTOR_REDIS_URL set, else in-process TTL. Disk reserved for permanent artifacts.

data.name: Recurrent trading loop
data.location: autvestor/live/loop.py — run_trading_cycle/run_trading_loop (fetch -> signal -> allocate -> risk -> diff -> orders -> persist); re-fetches bars+news each cycle; drawdown breach flattens+halts; live-consent gated. CLI trade-loop (--synthetic for offline).

data.title: Ongoing strategy finetuning + production hardening on branch dev/finetuning (v0.1.0 baseline)
